overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring a traditional Japanese hot spring village surrounded by dense bamboo forest. The character walks across stone platforms and wooden paths around turquoise thermal pools and misty waterfalls, passing villagers and traditional wooden houses under an overcast, stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: natural hot spring with wooden walkways and stone platforms

events.description: character steps from wooden planks onto mossy stone platforms over the water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across wooden and stone platforms over turquoise hot spring water toward a large misty waterfall

notable_agents.action: person bathing in the hot spring pool to the left of the path

entered.detail: stacked wooden crates and barrels at the starting point
milky turquoise thermal water with steam rising
moss-covered stone slabs forming a path over the water
dense bamboo grove surrounding the hot spring area
tall bamboo stalks framing the right side of the view
tall waterfall cascading down rocks with heavy mist

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the samurai character walking across wooden planks and stone platforms suspended over a turquoise hot spring pool. Steam rises from the water where a bather soaks on the left. Dense bamboo forests frame the scene as the character approaches a large misty waterfall in the distance.

events.description: character stops at waterfall overlook and begins turning around
camera pans to reveal brighter sky breaking through clouds over the cliff

agents.ego_description: reaching the waterfall viewpoint, pausing to observe, then turning to survey the surrounding cliffs and forest

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall with patches of moss and small plants

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the misty waterfall overlook, standing on rocky terrain as steam billows from the cascading water. The camera pans to reveal the dramatic cliff faces and dense bamboo forest, with the turquoise pools now visible to the left as the character turns to survey the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path leading to traditional village

events.description: approaching traditional wooden buildings and stairs of the village

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path returning toward the village area, passing the bather again and approaching wooden stairs

notable_agents.action: bather still visible in the hot spring pool

entered.detail: weathered wooden steps leading up to the village houses
traditional Japanese wooden building with dark timber walls
traditional stone lantern along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks back along the forest path, passing the bather once more in the turquoise pool. The scene transitions toward a traditional village as wooden stairs and timber houses come into view, surrounded by dense bamboo groves and traditional stone lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese village with wooden houses and villagers

events.description: entering village area with multiple NPCs sitting and standing near buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the village passing NPCs, observing the traditional architecture and villagers going about their activities

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden house entrance watching the character
villager sitting on the ground near the path

entered.detail: traditional building with thatched roof and hanging paper lantern
illuminated paper lantern hanging from the eaves
simple wooden fence along the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters the village proper, walking between traditional wooden houses with thatched roofs. Villagers are visible sitting and standing near the buildings. The path is narrower here, sheltered by trees and building overhangs, with warm light glowing from paper lanterns hanging from the eaves.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside path with wooden bridge crossing

events.description: character crosses wooden bridge over the turquoise water

agents.ego_description: crossing a wooden bridge over the water and continuing through the village outskirts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on wooden platform by the water's edge

entered.detail: rickety wooden bridge crossing over the turquoise hot spring water
piles of cut logs and wooden planks near the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden bridge over the turquoise water, passing a villager sitting on the platform. The path continues through the village outskirts with stacked wood piles visible, leading back toward the bamboo forest and hot spring areas, completing the circuit through the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the serene thermal pools of a hot spring retreat toward the structured architecture of a traditional village. It begins with the samurai walking across wooden planks and stone platforms suspended over steaming turquoise water, where a bather soaks amidst a framing of dense bamboo. As the character reaches a rocky overlook, the scene expands to reveal a dramatic misty waterfall cascading against steep cliff faces. The camera then turns back along the forest path, passing the thermal pools once more before the terrain shifts toward a residential area. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal timber houses, wooden stairs, and traditional stone lanterns nestled within the surrounding bamboo groves.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sheltered residential village that gradually opens back toward the surrounding wilderness. It begins with the character navigating a narrow path between traditional thatched-roof houses, where warm light glows from paper lanterns hanging under the eaves. As the character passes villagers resting near the buildings, the scene shifts toward the village outskirts, crossing a wooden bridge over turquoise thermal waters. The camera then follows the path past stacked wood piles, moving away from the settlement before finally turning back toward the dense bamboo forest and hot spring areas.
